ticket.subject: Feature request: Support for composite indexes combining full-text search with BM25 ranking
ticket.body: Currently, when I try to combine a full-text search query with a BM25 relevance ranking filter, the query planner doesn't utilize the existing full-text index and instead performs a table scan on the results. It would be really helpful to have a recommended approach (or configuration option) that allows full-text search with BM25 ranking to work efficiently without sacrificing performance. Is this something planned for a future release, or should we be creating materialized views with pre-computed scores as a workaround?
